<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Drivers\Imagick\Encoders; use Imagick; use Intervention\Image\EncodedImage; use Intervention\Image\Encoders\BmpEncoder as GenericBmpEncoder; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\EncodedImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\ImageInterface; use Intervention\Image\Interfaces\SpecializedInterface; class BmpEncoder extends GenericBmpEncoder implements SpecializedInterface { public function encode(ImageInterface $image): EncodedImageInterface { $format = 'BMP'; $compression = Imagick::COMPRESSION_NO; $imagick = $image->core()->native(); $imagick->setFormat($format); $imagick->setImageFormat($format); $imagick->setCompression($compression); $imagick->setImageCompression($compression); return new EncodedImage($imagick->getImagesBlob(), 'image/bmp'); } }
